title: Wind turbine working platform
abstract: A working platform (100) for installation on an off-shore wind turbine is disclosed. The working platform comprises an impermeable top plate (120) forming a top side (124) of the working platform when installed, an impermeable bottom plate (121) forming a bottom side (123) of the working platform when installed and one or more impermeable side plates (130, 131, 132) The impermeable top (120), bottom (121) and side plates (130, 131, 132) are further arranged together to form an enclosed space impervious to water.
claims:
Claims 1. A working platform (100) for installation on an off-shore wind turbine (200), the working platform comprising: - an impermeable top plate (120) forming a top side (124) of the working platform when installed; and - an impermeable bottom plate (121 ) forming a bottom side (123) of the working platform when installed; and - one or more impermeable side plates (130, 131 , 132); and wherein the impermeable top (120), bottom (121 ) and side plates (130, 131 , 132) are arranged together to form an enclosed space impervious to water. 2. The working platform (100) according to claim 1 wherein the impermeable top (120), bottom (121 ) and side plates (130, 131 , 132) are further arranged together to form a self-supporting structure. 3. The working platform (100) according to claim 1 or 2 wherein the one or more impermeable side plates (130, 131 , 132) further contribute to the vertical deflection resistance when installed. 4. The working platform (100) according to claim 3 wherein the height of the one or more impermeable side plates (130, 131 , 132) are determined such that the vertical deflection, when installed, is below a predetermined maximum vertical deflection. 5. The working platform (100) according to any one of the preceding claims wherein the one or more impermeable side plates (130, 131 , 132) comprise an inner (132) and outer (130, 131 ) side plate arranged such that the enclosed space surrounds a through-hole (125) by the inner side plate and extents outwardly from the through-hole up to the outer side plate; and wherein the through-hole is for fitting over a tubular cross-section (201 ) of the off-shore wind turbine (200). 6. The working platform (100) according to any one of the preceding claims further comprising one or more inner beams (161 -167, 141-144, 151 -154) within the enclosed space connected to the top (120) and/or bottom plate (121 ) such that the top and/or bottom plate are supported and such that, when in use, the one or more inner beams further contribute to the vertical deflection resistance. 7. The working platform (100) according to claim 6 wherein the one or more inner beams (141 -144, 151 -154) are arranged according to a grid pattern. 8. The working platform (100) according to claim 7 wherein the inner beams comprise slots; and wherein inner beams crossing each other according to the grid pattern are fitted into each other by the slots. 9. The working platform (100) according to any one of the preceding claims wherein the impermeable top (120), bottom (121 ) and side plates (130, 131 , 132) are made of metal and welded together to form the enclosed space impervious to rain. 10. The working platform (100) according to claim 9 and to any one of claims 6 to 8 wherein the one or more inner beams are made of metal and welded to the top and/or bottom plate. 11. An off-shore wind turbine (200) comprising the working platform (100) according to any one of the preceding claims. 12. A method for manufacturing the working platform (100) according to any one of claims 1 to 10 as long as dependent on claim 7 comprising the steps of: - providing a first plate (320); and - fixing the one or more inner beams (341 -343, 351-353) on the first plate; and 

 - fixing on or more plates (321 a-321 b) onto the one or more inner beams thereby forming a second plate; and - fixing the one or more side plates to the sides of the first and second plate; and wherein the first (320) and second plate (321 ) respectively correspond to the bottom and top plate or wherein the first and second plate respectively correspond to the top and bottom plate. 13. The method according to claim 12 further comprising the steps of: - fixing a first subset (341-343) of the one or more inner beams on the first plate; - fixing a second subset (351 -353) of the one or more inner beams on the first plate such that the first and second subset form a grid pattern. 14. The method according to claim 12 or 13 further comprising the steps of: - welding the one or more inner beams (341 -343, 351 -353) onto the first plate; and - welding the one or more plates (321 a, 321 b) onto the one or more inner beams. 15. The method according to claim 14 wherein the welding the one or more inner beams (341 -343, 351 -353) is performed by staggered welding.
